title: Delete 4th navigation link

requirements.text: Remove the 4th anchor link element from the navigation bar in the Layout component. The element is identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/nav[1]/div[1]/div[1]/a[4]. Keep all other navigation links intact.

quotes: I prefer the first template link delete the second

acceptanceCriteria: The navigation bar contains one fewer link — specifically the 4th link is removed
All remaining navigation links continue to work correctly
The navigation layout looks correct with the remaining links

constraints: Only remove the 4th navigation link (a[4]); do not modify any other navigation items
Do not edit any immutable frontend paths
nonGoals: Changing navigation styling or layout beyond the removal
